examples: "The Whipping Block" has never been published, but it's supposed to be a really good poem.
Now they are not driven by fear of whipping, but the hope of freedom encourages them.
Players were whipping their shirts off.
The government responded by whipping MPs through the Commons to defeat the measure, promising to legislate later.
Swirling winds whipping off the Ohio River made it feel like 59 degrees below zero.
